info.name: Oracle Cloud Compute API
info.description:
Manage compute instances, images, shapes, and related resources in Oracle Cloud Infrastructure.

Contact Support:
 Name: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure

variable.description: (Required) The action to perform on the instance.

request.description: Performs an action on the specified instance such as start, stop, reset, or soft reset.
